title: Brown Paper Bags Strung - 7 x 7", 200 Pack, Takeaway Lunch Sandwich Fruit Pastry Sweets, 35gsm kraft material
features: Durable 35gsm Kraft Paper Bags – Made from brown kraft paper, these strung paper bags are lightweight yet strong enough for everyday packaging. Ideal for shops, cafes, bakeries, and market stalls looking for reliable and eco-friendly packaging.

Convenient Strung Design for Easy Use – Each lunch bag is pre-strung with durable cotton string, easy to hang and grab. Great for businesses that need quick, hassle-free packaging solutions while maintaining a professional presentation.

100% Recyclable – Manufactured from biodegradable kraft paper, these brown paper bags are plastic-free and fully recyclable. A sustainable alternative to single-use plastic bags, perfect for businesses wanting to reduce waste and show eco-conscious values.

Versatile Multi-Purpose Use – Suitable for food items like sandwiches, sweets, and snacks, as well as retail goods, small gifts, hardware, or craft supplies. These sandwich bags are ideal for both commercial and household use.

Simple & Professional Presentation – The natural brown kraft finish provides a clean, rustic look that suits all occasions. Whether used in shops, takeaways, events, or home storage, these paper takeaway bags combine practicality with an eco-conscious style.

Choose your bag size Merchant video Previous page Next page Can I use these bags for pastries, croissants, or other greasy foods? Yes, but please note these are plain kraft paper bags, so over time oils and grease may show through the paper. For dry foods (sandwiches, bread rolls, fruit, sweets, etc.) they work perfectly. The paper feels quite thin. Are the bags strong enough? They’re lightweight and reliable - designed for quick, convenient use, like serving sandwiches, sweets, and snacks. Easy to open and handle, and ideal for high-volume settings (cafés, takeaways, parties) where speed and value matter most. How many bags do I get, and what does strung mean? They come in packs of 100 bags with a small string in the corner, keeping the stack together. This makes them quick to grab, separate, and use — perfect for busy shops, cafés, or events. If you don’t need the string, simply cut it and use them loose. Are these bags food-safe and recyclable? Yes. Made from plain kraft paper, they are food-safe, 100% recyclable, a great choice for everyday use. Can I customize these bags with my business logo or design? Absolutely! Our bags are a perfect blank canvas for you to apply branding and personalization. You can easily add your logo, artwork, sticker or messages to create a unique and professional look for your business.
